notes.code_coverage: coverage.py total percent_covered for the selected validator target.
notes.branch_coverage: coverage.py covered_branches / num_branches for the selected validator target.
notes.sample_sizes_per_class: Each n requests n positive samples and n negative samples. Tools without negative generation may return only positive samples.
notes.timeout_seconds: Each (tool, n) job has this wall-clock timeout for generation plus coverage measurement.
notes.external_tools: The tool registry includes RandExp.js and MutRex. RandExp.js is positive-only; MutRex may return fewer samples because its mutation suite is finite.
notes.mutrex_semantics: MutRex CONF/REJECT labels are checked with Python re.fullmatch; dialect disagreements are recorded in failure_details.
